title: SchoolSense
subtitle: AI-Powered School Discovery Platform
tagline: Semantic school search and AI recommendations for parents.
description: A production-style school discovery platform designed around semantic retrieval, AI recommendations, role-based workflows, and moderation.
features: Role-based platform for parents, school managers, and admins

behindSystem.challenge: Parents need to compare schools using messy real-world criteria, not only exact keyword matches.
behindSystem.architecture: Laravel service layers separate search orchestration, school data, role workflows, and AI recommendation logic.
behindSystem.backendWorkflow: School data is normalized, embedded, stored in PostgreSQL with pgvector, then retrieved through semantic and hybrid search paths.
behindSystem.aiDataFlow: User intent is converted into search context, matched against embeddings, and passed into Gemini-powered recommendation flows.

title: TalentConnect
subtitle: AI-Powered Recruitment Platform
tagline: Job seeker app, backoffice, and shared backend package.
description: A multi-repository recruitment system with a job seeker app, admin/backoffice workflows, shared migrations/models, Laravel Cloud resume storage, PDF-to-text extraction, and AI-assisted candidate analysis.
features: Shared migrations and models through Job-Shared
Resume upload and storage through Laravel Cloud
PDF-to-text extraction pipeline for resume analysis

behindSystem.challenge: Recruitment workflows need separation between applicant-facing features, backoffice operations, and shared domain data.
behindSystem.architecture: The system is split into app, backoffice, and shared package repositories to keep reusable migrations/models separate.
behindSystem.backendWorkflow: Applicants and employers move through separated workflows while shared models keep the domain consistent across apps.
behindSystem.aiDataFlow: Resume PDFs are uploaded through the app, stored with Laravel Cloud, converted into text, then prepared for AI-assisted candidate analysis and recruiter decision support.

title: Cinema Ticket Reservation
subtitle: Reservation and booking system
tagline: Cinema seat booking and ticket reservation workflow.
description: A domain-focused reservation system for modeling booking flow, ticket state, and practical application behavior.

behindSystem.challenge: Reservation systems require clear handling of booking state and data consistency.
behindSystem.architecture: The project models cinema booking entities and separates reservation behavior from data structure.
behindSystem.backendWorkflow: Users move through selecting tickets, reserving seats or shows, and storing booking data.
behindSystem.aiDataFlow: No AI flow; the focus is domain modeling and reservation logic.

title: Laravel Job Board
subtitle: Job listing web application
tagline: Job posting and browsing platform built with Laravel.
description: A Laravel job board project for practicing route design, controllers, database-backed pages, and backend web application structure.

behindSystem.challenge: Job boards need clear listing, browsing, and data-driven page workflows.
behindSystem.architecture: Laravel MVC patterns organize routes, controllers, views, and database-backed job data.
behindSystem.backendWorkflow: Job data is stored, displayed, and routed through standard backend web workflows.
behindSystem.aiDataFlow: No AI flow; this project focuses on Laravel fundamentals and backend structure.

title: Banking System
subtitle: Banking domain practice project
tagline: Account and transaction logic for banking workflows.
description: A banking system project for practicing transaction-oriented business logic, data integrity, and system modeling.

behindSystem.challenge: Banking workflows require careful thinking around accounts, transaction state, and integrity.
behindSystem.architecture: The project models banking entities and keeps core transaction behavior explicit.
behindSystem.backendWorkflow: Account operations and transaction-style actions are handled through structured application logic.
behindSystem.aiDataFlow: No AI flow; the focus is reliable business logic.

title: WeatherNow
subtitle: Weather application
tagline: Simple weather experience with a clean interface.
description: A weather application focused on frontend structure, external data display, responsive UI, and user-friendly interaction.

behindSystem.challenge: Weather apps need simple data presentation without overwhelming the user.
behindSystem.architecture: A lightweight frontend structure separates UI display from external weather data handling.
behindSystem.backendWorkflow: No backend workflow; the project practices external data consumption and frontend rendering.
behindSystem.aiDataFlow: No AI flow; the focus is API-style data display.

title: MySQL Practice
subtitle: SQL and database practice
tagline: Database queries, schema practice, and SQL fundamentals.
description: A MySQL practice repository for strengthening query writing, relational thinking, schema design, and database fundamentals.

behindSystem.challenge: Strong backend systems depend on clear relational thinking and query fundamentals.
behindSystem.architecture: Practice exercises focus on schema design, SQL statements, and relational data modeling.
behindSystem.backendWorkflow: Queries and schema exercises support the data layer skills needed in backend applications.
behindSystem.aiDataFlow: No AI flow; the focus is database fundamentals.
